Hero.title: Issik-Kul Soft
Hero.subtitle: We know how to do it better

About.paragraph1:
We design and launch complex web systems that turn chaos into profit and bring in new clients.
Implementing world-class web standards from Issyk-Kul to Osh.
About.paragraph2:
We don't just draw pretty websites, we build tools. Our approach is accuracy and reliability, multiplied by an understanding of the modern market. We are here to prove:
world-class products can be and are made in Kyrgyzstan.

AboutTeam.description:
The first in Issyk-Kul,
we've built a team that doesn't just follow trends,
but sets them.
AboutTeam.orbitText: A small, close-knit, but incredibly strong team.

daerdree.title: Daerdree bar & timeclub
daerdree.category: A place with atmosphere and soul

OurMission.historyP1: Мы создали IkSoft, потому что устали видеть, как перспективные бренды буксуют из-за немощных технологий. Слишком долго бизнес кормили шаблонными решениями, медленными сайтами на конструкторах и "красивыми" картинками, за которыми нет никакой инженерной базы.
OurMission.historyP2: Наша компания предлагает продукт, который не просто выглядит хорошо, а работает на ваш бизнес. Мы строим цифровые экосистемы, которые масштабируются вместе с вами и не разваливаются при первом же росте трафика или добавлении новых функций.
OurMission.historyP3: Мы верим, что успех бренда сегодня - это на 50% его цифровая инфраструктура. Мы пишем чистый, структурированный код, потому что он работает на ваш бизнес быстрее и эффективнее.
OurMission.missionText:
Наша команда понимает ценность современных инструментов и умеет их использовать, чтобы ваш бизнес рос день ото дня, а не просто "присутствовал" в сети.
Мы здесь, чтобы поднять планку. Засучив рукава.

Services.subtitle: We know how to do it better
Services.title: Our Services:

landing.title: Landing Page
landing.description: The entry point for your traffic. We design landing pages to turn visitors into clients. Perfect structure, catchy copywriting, and design that hits the mark.

corporate.title: Corporate Website
corporate.description: The digital headquarters of your brand. We build platforms that broadcast your values and build trust from the first second. Convenient admin panel, SEO foundation, and flawless performance on all devices.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce
ecommerce.description: Your business working 24/7. We build powerful online stores focused on the User Journey. From a convenient catalog to secure payment, we remove all barriers between the product and the buyer.

webapp.title: Web Applications
webapp.description: More than just a website. We develop complex ecosystems: CRMs, personal dashboards, SaaS solutions. Tools that automate routines and help your business scale.

01.question: How long does development take?
01.answer: Timelines depend on complexity. A landing page takes 3-5 days, a corporate website 2-3 weeks. We always fix deadlines in the contract and pay penalties for delays.

02.question: What is needed to get started?
02.answer: We need you to fill out a brief and discuss your business goals. If you have references or a brandbook, it will speed up the process. A 50% prepayment is required before starting.

03.question: Will the website work on mobile phones?
03.answer: Absolutely. Mobile-first is our standard. We test websites on all popular screen sizes so they run smoothly on iPhones, Androids, and tablets.

04.question: Do you provide support after launch?
04.answer: Yes, we provide a warranty for technical flawless operation. We can also take the project on monthly support: updating content, monitoring security, and developing new features.

05.question: Can I add new features later?
05.answer: Our code is modular and clean. You can always upgrade the functionality, add new pages or integrations without rewriting the entire website from scratch.
